title: Pension schemes newsletter 152 — July 2023
body: "This newsletter is published by HMRC’s Pension Schemes Services to update stakeholders on the latest news for pension schemes.  Pension schemes newsletter 152 has articles on:   Legislation Day (L-Day) 2023 relief at source — annual return of information for the tax year 2022 to 2023 pension flexibility statistics qualifying recognised overseas pension schemes transfer statistics purpose of a registered pension scheme  "
